title: Axolotl Fixes
description: Fixes bugs related to the axolotl which was introduced in 20w51a
body:
This fixes some of the axolotl bugs in 20w51a.
   
 

The fixed bugs are:
* Axlotls didn't give regen and remove mining fatigue when player killed an attacking mob
* Axolotls didn't attack elder guardians
* Axolotl buckets didn't save axolotl nbt data
